paper_title: A new look at the multi-G model for organic carbon degradation in surface marine sediments for coupled benthic–pelagic simulations of the global ocean

methods.description: This method describes the calculation of the kinetics of Particulate Organic Carbon (POC) degradation in bioturbated surface sediments using a 1-D reaction transport model. It links benthic POC degradation to POC reactivity in the water column.

steps.description: Calculate the rate of POC degradation at the sediment surface, RPOC(0, t), using the total POC content at the sediment-water interface and its apparent reactivity.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate POC degradation rate at sediment surface using POC content and reactivity

steps.description: Estimate the rate constants of discrete POC reactivity fractions (highly reactive, reactive, and refractory) using the sediment model.
steps.searchable_summary: Estimate rate constants for POC reactivity fractions

steps.description: Calculate the ratio f 1 /f 0 as a function of k app (wd) and CBE to estimate k 0 and k 1.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate f 1 /f 0 ratio to estimate k 0 and k 1

steps.description: Scale k 2 to the sedimentation rate to account for deep sea conditions.

methods.description: This method involves simulating the degradation and content of POC in bioturbated surface sediments using a 1-D reaction transport model. It includes solute transport and reaction network modeling.

steps.description: Simulate the degradation and content of POC using the 1-D reaction transport model with solutes like O2, NO3-, NO2-, and NH4+.
steps.searchable_summary: Simulate POC degradation using 1-D reaction transport model

steps.description: Transport POC by burial with compaction and mixing by bioturbation.
steps.searchable_summary: Transport POC by burial and bioturbation

steps.description: Transport solutes by burial, molecular diffusion, bioturbation, and bioirrigation.
Solve mass balance equations for concentration changes with time until a steady state is reached.
steps.searchable_summary: Solve mass balance equations for steady state
